CREATING A CULTURE OF
EMPOWERMENT

-- 1 of 23 --

CULTURE > STRATEGY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 23 --

WHY?
FOCUS ON HIRING AND DEVELOPING THE RIGHT
PEOPLE AND...THEY WILL BUILD STRATEGY FOR YOU
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 23 --

IF YOU DON’T LET OTHER PEOPLE LEAD YOU WILL
BE THE SOLE CAP ON THE BUSINESS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 23 --

UNIVERSALLY ACKNOWLEDGED
EXAMPLE:
JESUS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 23 --

IDENTIFIED 12 MEN WITH LITTLE EXPERIENCE
INVESTED HIS LIFE IN THEM
EMPOWERED THEM
SPENT 3 YEARS WITH THEM
THEN TOLD THEM TO GO CHANGE THE WORLD
“GO AND MAKE DISCIPLES OF ALL NATIONS”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 23 --

THIS IDENTIFIES THE TWO
CURRENCIES OF EMPOWERMENT
CLARITY AND TRUST
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 23 --

HOW DO WE APPLY AND MEASURE
THESE CURRENCIES?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 23 --

1) COMMUNICATE WITH CLARITY
2) EXTEND TRUST
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 23 --

COMMUNICATE WITH CLARITY
1. WHAT
(GO AND MAKE DISCIPLES)
2. WHERE
(ALL NATIONS)
3. WHEN
(NOW AND FOR THE REST OF LIFE)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 23 --

BUT WHAT ABOUT THE HOW?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 23 --

YOU EXTEND TRUST AND LET
THEM DECIDE THE HOW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 23 --

BUT HOW DO I KNOW IF I CAN
TRUST SOMEONE??
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 23 --

THE BEST WAY TO FIGURE OUT IF
YOU CAN TRUST SOMEONE IS...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 23 --

TRUST THEM.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 23 --

GIVE THEM FREEDOM.
GIVE THEM OPPORTUNITY.
YOU INVEST IN THEM, AND
THEN YOU TRUST THEM.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 23 --

BUT WHAT IS CLARITY WITHOUT TRUST
AND TRUST WITHOUT CLARITY?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 23 --

CLARITY WITHOUT TRUST PRODUCES
FEAR AND INACTION
(KNOWS WHAT TO DO BUT DOESN’T
BELIEVE YOU THE LEADER TRUSTS
THEM TO DO IT CAUSING INACTION)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 23 --

TRUST WITHOUT CLARITY PRODUCES
WORK WITHOUT DIRECTION.
THAT LEADS TO ‘BUSY WORK’ BECAUSE
THEY HAVE NO IDEA OF ORDER OF
IMPORTANCE BECAUSE THERE IS NO GOAL.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 23 --

CLARITY ENSURES YOUR TEAM MEMBERS WORK
IS ALIGNED WITH YOUR GOALS AND MISSION
(THE KNOW HOW THEY CONTRIBUTE
TO THE BIG PICTURE GOAL AND HOW
NECESSARY THEIR WORK IS)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 23 --

TRUST IS THE NECESSARY NET THAT
RESULTS IN RISK TAKING
(BECAUSE YOU BELIEVE IN ME I CAN
TRY, I HAVE THE FREEDOM TO
CREATE, INNOVATE, TRY AND FAIL)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 23 --

WHAT IF I DON’T TRUST THE
PEOPLE I WORK WITH?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 23 --

THEN EITHER YOU HAVE THE WRONG TEAM
OR YOU ARE THE WRONG LEADER
EITHER WAY IT’S YOUR PROBLEM TO SOLVE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 23 --
